c.d: The number and creativity of available filters, including artistic and AI-driven effects
Range of tools for photo corrections, enhancements, background removal, layering, retouching, and montage creation

c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: How intuitive and accessible the app is for users with various experience levels
Availability across iOS, Android, and desktop systems
Free, subscription, one-time purchase, or freemium with in-app purchases
Use of AI for suggesting edits, automatic background removal, face detection, and style transfer
Support for social sharing and community engagement such as photo challenges
